response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer (~16 years) with solid software craftsmanship credentials and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategic advisory experience. The resume shows no Principal/Staff-level strategic leadership at scale, no demonstrated AI products built or shipped, and minimal cloud platform depth beyond AWS CDK usage. The AI exposure is recent and tooling-oriented rather than strategic.
strengths: ~16 years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices at scale
Strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) with teaching/workshop track record
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms built; AI experience is nascent and tooling-focused
Lacks Director-level IC or strategic advisory experience with customers/partners on cloud and AI adoption
Limited deep cloud platform expertise; no Master's/PhD in AI-related field

key_factors.factor: No Director-level strategic leadership or advisory track record
